# Clofarabine 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Clofarabine 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Clofarabine</strong> 目前有 <strong>11 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Clofarabine 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of acute lymphoblastic leukaemia (ALL) in paediatric patients who have relapsed or are refractory after receiving at least two prior regimens and where there is no other treatment option...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>acute lymphoblastic leukemia (disease)（99.9%）</li>
<li>myeloid leukemia（99.9%）</li>
<li>leukemia, lymphocytic, susceptibility to（99.6%）</li>
<li>precursor lymphoblastic lymphoma/leukemia（99.6%）</li>
<li>acute lymphoblastic/lymphocytic leukemia（99.5%）</li>
<li>ganglioneuroblastoma (disease)（99.5%）</li>
<li>neuroblastoma（99.5%）</li>
<li>vertebral anomalies and variable endocrine and T-cell dysfunction（99.5%）</li>
<li>retroperitoneal neoplasm（99.4%）</li>
<li>blast phase chronic myelogenous leukemia, BCR-ABL1 positive（99.4%）</li>
<li>acute lymphoblastic leukemia（99.3%）</li>
<li>chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma with immunoglobulin heavy chain variable-region gene somatic hypermutation（99.3%）</li>
<li>pregerminal center chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma（99.3%）</li>
<li>Hodgkins lymphoma（99.1%）</li>
<li>precursor T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia（98.9%）</li>
<li>bladder transitional cell carcinoma（98.5%）</li>
<li>lymphoid neoplasm（98.3%）</li>
<li>follicular lymphoma（98.2%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（97.9%）</li>
<li>obsolete Hodgkin's granuloma（97.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/clofarabine/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
